message:
audit: fresh-eyes audit batch 456 — 32 files (~4,400L), all SOUND, 0 bugs

Batch 456 covers security module (key, tag, context, mod, authenticated, error),
runtime internals (local, yield_now, mod, waker, timer, stored_task, scheduler/mod),
types (mod, policy), signal (kind, mod, shutdown), time/mod, tls (mod, error),
web/mod, util (mod, cache, det_rng), transport (mod, error), record/mod,
trace (mod, distributed/mod), tracing_compat — all SOUND, 0 bugs found.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
